name: HRG_GOAL_PLANS_B
description: Stores the goal plan definition related details

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: The system generated surrogate key for this entry.

columns.Name: EVALUATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column is to set evaluation type to be used in Performance template

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_BUSINESS_GROUPS

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Type of Goal Plan.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Goal Plan start date

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: Goal Plan end date

columns.Name: GOAL_SETTING_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Goal Plan Goal Set Start Date

columns.Name: GOAL_SETTING_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Goal Plan Goal Set End Date

columns.Name: RESTRICT_GOAL_CREATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag Indicate Restricting Goal Creation after Goal Set End Date

columns.Name: RESTRICT_GOAL_UPDATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag Indicate Restricting Goal Update after Goal Set End Date

columns.Name: ENABLE_WEIGHTING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate whether weighting can be specified with goal.

columns.Name: PREVIOUS_GOAL_PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRG_GOAL_PLANS_B, which holds the ID of previous goal plan.

columns.Name: MASS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRG_GOAL_MASS_REQUESTS

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_EXT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique for goal plan. Need an migration script to populate this value of existing goal plans.

columns.Name: GOAL_SUB_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Goal Sub type to support customer specific requirements. Lookup HRG_SUB_TYPE_CODE will list the values.

columns.Name: GOAL_ACCESS_LEVEL_CODE
columns.Comments: The goals in the goal plan with this column set, would be view-only (no insert/update/delete). Lookup HRG_ACCESS_LEVELS will list the values.

columns.Name: INCLUDE_IN_PERFDOC_FLAG
columns.Comments: If this flag is set, the goals in the goal plan would be added to PD

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: This colum is to decide whether plan is active or not

columns.Name: AUTO_ASSOCIATE_GOAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column to identify whether this goal plan can be considered for auto goal assignment

columns.Name: REQUEST_UI_CONTEXT_CODE
columns.Comments: this column to identify the request context of the goal plan (UI or File based loader)

columns.Name: ENFORCE_GOAL_WEIGHT_FLAG
columns.Comments: This is to enforce thesummation of goal  weight to 100 at goal plan level if set to yes

columns.Name: PRIMARY_GOAL_PLAN_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag indicates whether the goal plan is chosen as primary.

columns.Name: CAN_DEL_HR_GOAL
columns.Comments: This value indicates whether HR assigned goals can be deleted or canceled by managers and workers

columns.Name: MAX_GOALS_NUM_IN_GOAL_PLAN
columns.Comments: This field is for restricting the number of goals in a goal plan to help support the requirement of limiting the number of performance goals that employees need to focus on during the review period.

columns.Name: ENFORCE_MAX_GOALS_IN_GP_FLAG
columns.Comments: This field is for enforcing the number of goals in a goal plan to help support the requirement of limiting the number of performance goals on manager and HR goal assignments.

columns.Name: ALLOW_PVT_GOAL_MAX_GOAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: If this flag is set, employee can add the goals in the goal plan as private goals when max goals in goal plan limit is reached.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: REVIEW_PERIOD_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_REVIEW_PERIODS_B

columns.Name: CREATED_BY_SYSTEM
columns.Comments: If this flag is Y, it means that goal plan is created by system.

columns.Name: ALL_DEPARTMENTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: ALL_DEPARTMENTS_FLAG

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: REQUEST_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores request status of the last ESS job submitted for this goal plan

columns.Name: MIN_GOALS_NUM_IN_GOAL_PLAN
columns.Comments: This field is for restricting for minimum number of goals in a goal plan
